name: page-forge
title: Page Forge
description: Inspect, safely prepare, and explicitly send EPUB files to Kindle.
author: rckbrcls

commands.name: inspect-epub
commands.title: Page Forge: Inspect EPUB
commands.description: Inspect EPUB health without modifying the original file.

commands.name: prepare-epub-for-kindle
commands.title: Page Forge: Prepare EPUB for Kindle
commands.description: Review safe repairs and create a revalidated Kindle-ready EPUB copy.

commands.name: send-epub-to-kindle
commands.title: Page Forge: Send EPUB to Kindle
commands.description: Review eligible EPUB files and explicitly submit them to Kindle.

preferences.name: senderAddress
preferences.title: Sender Address
preferences.description: Email address approved to send documents to your Kindle.

preferences.name: smtpHost
preferences.title: SMTP Host
preferences.description: Hostname of the SMTP server used for delivery.

preferences.name: smtpPort
preferences.title: SMTP Port
preferences.description: SMTP port from 1 through 65535; typically 465 or 587.

preferences.name: securityMode
preferences.title: Security Mode
preferences.description: Require implicit TLS or a STARTTLS upgrade before authentication.

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: Username
preferences.description: Username used to authenticate with the SMTP server.

preferences.name: appPassword
preferences.title: App Password
preferences.description: Application-specific password used for SMTP authentication.

preferences.name: kindleAddress
preferences.title: Kindle Address
preferences.description: Personal Send to Kindle address ending in @kindle.com.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "throw new Error('Publish Page Forge through the Raycast Store with npm run publish, not npm publish.')"
